history.text: Associated State tied the territory into a wider political structure.
Saint Lucia became independent from the United Kingdom, marking a key step in modern statehood.

worthSeeing.title: The Pitons:
worthSeeing.text: Twin volcanic spires rising from the sea - a UNESCO World Heritage landscape.

worthSeeing.title: Sulphur Springs:
worthSeeing.text: The world's only drive-in volcano with bubbling mud pools and steam vents.

worthSeeing.title: Marigot Bay:
worthSeeing.text: A stunning natural harbour described as one of the Caribbean's most beautiful.

planningQuestions.q: What is Saint Lucia known for?
planningQuestions.a: The Pitons, Sulphur Springs, Marigot Bay.
